title: Celia
writer: Edward J. Mason, Roy Plomley, A.R. Rawlinson
actors: Hy Hazell, Bruce Lester, Elsie Wagstaff
plot: An actress is persuaded by her boyfriend, the head of a private-detective agency, to take a job as a housekeeper in the home of a wealthy elderly woman. It seems that no one has seen the woman for a while, and her new young husban...
